title: Delicate Basque Chicken Paella
description: A traditional Basque dish with a French twist, featuring chicken, tarragon, and a lacquer glaze, made with low glycemic ingredients. This paella is perfect for a special dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the tarragon, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the Arborio rice to the pan and stir to combine with the chicken and onion mixture.
Add the chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Brush the lacquer glaze over the top of the paella and continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
